nodes.label: Vellum extraction: standalone repo + npm
nodes.verdict:
Realized. Vellum lives at https://github.com/cailmdaley/vellum-reader
(232 commits preserved via `git filter-repo`) with a local checkout at
`~/Documents/projects/vellum`. MIT-licensed, README scaffold carries
the `TAPESTRIES_SCREENSHOT: vellum-on-vellum` placeholder, and a
self-referential `.felt/vellum-on-vellum/` fiber sits ready for the
next constitution to publish.

The constitution called for `npm publish`; per the human in interactive
mode, that was overscoped for "GitHub at this point" ŌĆö switched to a
`file:` dep that resolves to the sibling checkout. No npm registry
involved. Package name `vellum` was already taken (vellum.ai), so the
fallback `vellum-reader` is used everywhere (npm-shape name, repo,
imports); local clone path stays `vellum/` per the original quality
bar.

Lightcone (`cail/core-public-api`, commit 332e24a): `vellum/` removed,
workspaces drop the entry, `bake` rewritten to copy from
`node_modules/vellum-reader/dist/` (where `npm install` symlinks
through `file:../../vellum`), README / CLAUDE.md / DEPLOY.md updated.
`npm install` + `npm run bake` exit 0; `public/` populates from the
sibling's dist.

Portolan (`main`, commit e4ae075): `"vellum": "file:../lightcone/vellum"`
ŌåÆ `"vellum-reader": "file:../vellum"`. The three vellum imports rename
to `vellum-reader`, tsconfig + vite.config `~` alias + `fs.allow`
repoint at `node_modules/vellum-reader/`. `npm install` + `npm run
build` exit 0. Merge conflict on `src/vellum/portolan-adapter.ts`
resolved (HEAD's new `fetchWithBootPrefetch` import kept alongside the
vellum-reader rename).

Next: [[ai-futures/portolan/tapestry/constitution-tapestries-publish]] dispatches and replaces the
README's TAPESTRIES_SCREENSHOT marker with the captured image of the
`vellum-on-vellum` fiber.

nodes.label: anthropic-stem-fellowship
nodes.verdict: **Submitted to Greenhouse on Friday May 15, 2026.** Final close-read pass landed the morning of submission: Q1 ┬Č2 small clarity fix ("on the data" ŌåÆ "on the inference"); Q3 ┬Č2 vague Lightcone-contributions sentence rewritten concrete ("Claude Code skills built around scientific workflows, and the viewers that render these inspectable records as navigable provenance graphs"); Q3 ┬Č3 substantially rewritten by Cail (merged "I am confident" + bitter-lesson reversal into one compound sentence as a single tension; added shuttle parenthetical with OpenAI Symphony inspiration, portolan parenthetical; cut "or system design" and "porting from TypeScript"); Q4 ┬Č3 missing-comma fix after "combined ranking"; Q4 ┬Č3 "analyses I have led" softened to "analyses I have contributed to" for consistency with Q1's role-claims. Backticks on tool names kept per Cail's preference for plaintext readability. All five textareas + CV submitted via Greenhouse. **Decision date: by June 1.**
